subject: [PATCH v2 02/14] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

reviews.author: SeongJae Park
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the rename of uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd does not include updating the arch-specific headers, which should be done to maintain consistency across architectures.

2026-05-08.patch_summary: This patch renames the uffd-wp PTE bit macros to simply 'uffd' across various architectures, including x86 and arm64. The rename is done to reflect that the bit is used for userfaultfd tracking, regardless of whether it's write-protect or read-write protect. This change is purely mechanical and does not alter any behavior. It also updates several header files and function definitions to use the new macro names.
